Stub functions for managing shared profile storage, including BLE and BT Classic pairing data.

# Purpose
The code provides a set of functions for managing Bluetooth pairing data and related information. It is part of a shared profile storage system, as indicated by the inclusion of the header file `shared_prf_storage.h`. The functions in this file allow for the storage, retrieval, and deletion of Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) and Bluetooth Classic pairing data. This includes operations for handling local device names, root keys, pairing information, and platform-specific bits. The functions are designed to interact with data structures such as `SMPairingInfo`, `SM128BitKey`, and `BTDeviceAddress`.

The code defines both void functions and functions that return a boolean value, indicating success or failure of the operation. The boolean-returning functions, such as [`shared_prf_storage_get_local_device_name`](<#shared_prf_storage_get_local_device_name>) and [`shared_prf_storage_get_root_key`](<#shared_prf_storage_get_root_key>), currently return `false`, suggesting that the actual implementation of data retrieval is not present in this file. The file also includes functions to erase all stored data, such as [`shared_prf_storage_wipe_all`](<#shared_prf_storage_wipe_all>), and to manage the state of a "getting started" process. This code is intended to be part of a larger system, providing an interface for managing Bluetooth-related data storage.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `services/common/shared_prf_storage/shared_prf_storage.h`
